title: The Neighbor in the Foundation
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: After a century of unexplained sinkholes swallowing entire city blocks, a structural engineer hired to inspect the bedrock discovers the city is built not on stone but on the carapace of a sleeping entity whose breathing cycles cause the ground to collapse, and it is beginning to stir.
long_description: After a century of unexplained sinkholes swallowing entire city blocks, a structural engineer hired to inspect the bedrock discovers the city is built not on stone but on the carapace of a sleeping entity whose breathing cycles cause the ground to collapse, and it is beginning to stir.
